title: viola × chrysantha
intro: Viola × chrysantha, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the wild pansy (Viola x sororia). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola × chrysantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve stress, while its antiseptic properties also make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Viola × chrysantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
